Case Study · 11

La Nova Sweets

Luxury Chocolate & Confectionery · Launch System · Marketing Engine

90 Days
Zero to Revenue
+250%
Month-3 Growth
100%
Premium Positioning
The Challenge

Where They Were

La Nova Sweets is a luxury chocolate and confectionery brand entering a market dominated by imported European names. The challenge was twofold: build a brand identity and visual language that communicates genuine luxury, and then create the go-to-market infrastructure to reach premium buyers — corporate gifting, weddings, and high-end personal gifting occasions.

The Solution

What We Built

LEOMAX deployed the Launch System to build La Nova's complete brand infrastructure — identity, packaging language, gifting presentation standards, and brand story — all designed around a single goal: to look and feel as premium as the product inside. The Marketing Engine then launched La Nova into the corporate gifting and premium consumer markets simultaneously.

Launch SystemMarketing Engine
The Brand Story

Building a Luxury Chocolate Brand from Scratch

Brand Architecture
Luxury Identity System

Every element of La Nova's brand — name treatment, packaging language, visual hierarchy, and tone of voice — was designed to communicate luxury before the product is even tasted. LEOMAX built the full brand system including packaging guidelines, gifting presentation standards, and the brand story.

Go-To-Market
Corporate & Premium Gifting

La Nova was positioned for the premium gifting market — corporate gifts, weddings, and luxury personal gifting. LEOMAX built the channel strategy, corporate sales system, and content infrastructure to reach gifting decision-makers in each vertical.

The Outcome

What Changed

La Nova launched with instant market credibility — the brand's visual identity and packaging commanded premium pricing from the first sale. Corporate gifting clients engaged quickly, and the content strategy built a luxury brand presence on social media that drives consistent inbound interest from individuals and companies looking for premium gifting solutions.

"Every element of our brand speaks luxury. LEOMAX made sure of that before we sold a single box."

— La Nova Sweets Founder
